title: Drained By Design
relevance_summary: ERC-20 approvals granted to the wrong contract leading to systematic draining of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets ERC-20 allowances to non-recommended contracts

red_flags: ERC-20 approvals granted to Settler contract
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sets ERC-20 allowances to non-recommended contracts
summary: Coinbase's fee wallet was systematically drained due to ERC-20 approvals being granted to the wrong contract, despite clear warnings in the documentation. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any transactions that set allowances to non-recommended contracts.
